title: Vibe Apps 的确井喷了。 AppStore 审核周期现在要数周或者数月了吗？朋友们体感怎么样？

content.summary: Vibe Apps 的确井喷了。 AppStore 审核周期现在要数周或者数月了吗？朋友们体感怎么样？ shirish (@shiri_shh) THE APPLE APP STORE IS DROWNING IN AI SLOP people are treating the App Store like a Medium blog spitting out apps one after another. All with zero users and $0 revenue. Apple reviews that used to take hours are now stretching into WEEKS and even months > more than 550k apps were submitted just last year, highest in a decade. — https://nitter.net/shiri_shh/status/2036307020396241228#m
